Hole Key  
 

No Trade
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: NONE
Race: NONE
Hole Key
No Trade
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: NONE
Race: NONE

Item Type:Keyv1
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:101 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Lucy Entry By:Illia
Item Updated By:Severrian
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-19 02:38:25
Page Updated:Fri Aug 5th, 2022

Expansion: Original
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 1
[Merchants | Quests | Comments ]
Lore:
This key unlocks the entrance to the Ruins of Old Paineel.

Once activated this key unlocks the achievement, Hole Key, removing the need for you to store the physical key.

Merchants


Vendor listing - Premium only

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Paineel
Quest Name
Hole Key (10 Points)

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Paineel

To get the Hole Key achievement, click the underwater rock at +571, -888 while holding the Hole Key on your cursor.

Once keyed, grab the key in your inventory and it will poof as it will no longer be required.
"Hole Key vanishes as you commit its details to memory."


Uploaded January 1st, 2022 by iventheassassin
Updated January 2nd, 2022
Send a correction
« Previous 1 2 Next »
Post Comment
Hole Key once again keyringable
QuoteReply
# Dec 07 2021 at 7:19 PM Rating: Excellent
nytmare
Sage
1,350 posts
From the December 7, 2021 patch:
- Fixed an issue that prevented the Hole Key from saving to your list of /keys.

This goes along with keys being moved from your key ring to achievements, in the same patch.

To buy the Hole Key, you first need Bone Crafted Key to operate the elevator into inner Paineel. Then use find to locate Rallia. Uncheck [ ] the "Show only items I can use" checkbox in the vendor window to view and purchase Hole Key (no trade). Head to the underwater rock door that leads to The Hole zone, and click the rock to keyring it, with the message "Hole Key has been added to your key ring". Once you've done that, the next time you pick up the item out of your inventory it will poof with the message "Hole Key vanishes as you commit its details to memory."

Edited, Dec 7th 2021 8:46pm by nytmare
▲ Page top
Can't believe nobody's mentioned this...
QuoteReply
# Apr 09 2012 at 1:37 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593971864543
Scholar
17 posts
Everybody I knew used to not bother with the key -- You could just hop into the pool and swim diagonally down into the crack of the stone doorway, then keep ducking/standing and you'll swim right past, glitching your way through the door. Large toons had to shrink to do it. Nowadays it's just unlocked and you can click to open, or you can jump right in from above.

Edited, May 4th 2012 11:17am by Gazic
▲ Page top
No longer exists
QuoteReply
# Apr 02 2012 at 6:52 PM Rating: Decent
Spiffe
Scholar
106 posts
Never mind... thought it didn't exist but you need to unclick "Show only items I can use".

Edited, Apr 2nd 2012 8:54pm by Spiffe

Yeah now that the door to The Hole is no longer locked, this key no longer adds to your keyring. So don't waste time buying it.
▲ Page top
Easy Faction
QuoteReply
# Jan 01 2009 at 12:16 AM Rating: Decent
Nocto
Scholar
19 posts
Hey, want an easy way to raise Heretics Faction with out having to spend hours in the Warrens? Here's how...

1.) Have to be, bare minimum, Level 30.
2.) Zone in to Erudin, from Toxxulia Forest, and Kill the Sentinels. Sentinels are anywhere from level 20-30 mobs.

I took my level 50 Iksar monk, who con'd Ready to Attack to the guards in Paineel, in there and killed 19 Sentinels. When I went back to Paineel I was amiable. Can figure on 4-5 Sentinel Kills per Faction Raise.

Now, this beats spending hours in the Warrens, killing countless numbers of Kobolds, doesn't it? Enjoy your Paineel/ Hole keys!
____________________________
Nocto
[93 Deathcaller] of Xev
<Chaos and Discontent>
[13 Necromancer] of Rallos Zek

▲ Page top
Hole Key
QuoteReply
# Oct 08 2008 at 10:21 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592780766000
3 posts
If you MUST get the key to the HOLE. Then just shroud in goblin form 60-70. Make sure your shroud has lock picks to open the outer door to the Paineel elevator. Make sure you have the requisite amount of pp, then find your way to the Vendor, buy the Key using SNEAK to be indifferent to her, and then use to shroud AA gate to return to the Spirit Shroud NPC. Voila, you have your key.
▲ Page top
Shroud does work
QuoteReply
# Aug 24 2007 at 5:18 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595175771465
20 posts
Disregard my last post...i didn't have the lockpick on my cursor...that works.
▲ Page top
Lockpicking in shroud
QuoteReply
# Aug 24 2007 at 4:12 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595175771465
20 posts
I'd really like to know how you were able to find a lockpick that a goblin can use. All the picks I've tried are unusable despite saying they can be used by all. Picking your way in goblin rogue shroud form can not work.
▲ Page top
Hole Key
QuoteReply
# Mar 15 2007 at 1:33 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591916431054
Scholar
31 posts
51 Dark Elf SK, Killed Kobolds in the Warrens long enough to burn though 3 Virtues, started at con Dubious, hit Apprehensive about the same time the My Faction Standing with Kobol Could Not Possibly Get Any Worse! Got the third Virtue, came out when it faded to refresh, and Bing! I was amiably!

You con the two Skeletal Guards in the Paineel Newbie Zone, Menbuknar and Heridion, once they like you, they politely ask you if you need a key, as opposed to the insults you get early on.

Once in Paineel, make your way to the teleport pads, the shop is in front of the pad to the palace, not thru it.

Vendor is a General supplies merchant named Rallia Hapera , sold me one for 106 pp 4 sp 2cp

FYI I turned in about 20 Kobold Molars to Royal Guard Lilkus, he's in the palace throne room, upstairs in the balcony. He gave me faction for several evil Erudite types, bad faction for the Erudin Paladins, (shakes in boots) and some ringmail armor pieces, kinda random. This upped my faction with the guards to "Kindly"

Both keys go on your keyring!
▲ Page top
Shroud works.
QuoteReply
# Feb 19 2007 at 11:45 PM Rating: Decent
Philliden
Scholar
200 posts
Confirmed: Shroud does indeed work. Picked my way into Paineel, sneak/hide to vendor, got behind vendor, right clicked and bought key for 126 pp.

I was dubious to vendor as a goblin rogue, but if you sneak/hide behind her, right click, she will sell to you.

Shroud does work, just did with my main the other day using 70 Gobby Rogue. Must have lockpicks on cursor then you click rock. Make sure you hide/sneak to the vendor (sow helps this go faster) and stand behind the merchant to purchase the key.

▲ Page top
who needs key?
QuoteReply
# Mar 13 2006 at 3:07 AM Rating: Decent
Baalfeus
10 posts
1. get an EB item so it is a lot safer to swim inside
2. shrink yourself to the maximum or use illusion gnome/halfling and you can swim inside without a key.
3. oldfashion rogue for lockpicking, but no need normally.
4. make a lvl 1 toon and bind yourself in the zone and jump down. there is a spot where you will not die when you jump down!
(5.) Graphicbug when you use a mount and wizzypet after you jumpd down (zoned) you are stuck on your pet. when you tell your pet than to go away you will take fall damage, but will not die. Don't know if that still works, but workd fine for me the last few years.

best regards
Dotterbart AB

ps: worst case - get faction up and buy key.
▲ Page top
RE: who needs key?
QuoteReply
# Mar 13 2006 at 7:23 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
p.p.s. The worst case scenario is to get a rogue shroud from PoK, buy a lockpick, pick the paineel entrance, snaeak and hide behind the merchant and buy a key.

Doing the faction is so last year.

Hole Key / Shrouds
QuoteReply
# Feb 02 2006 at 8:53 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591824719559
5 posts
Tried using the shroud tonight with the following results:

Used Goblin Rogue (lvl70) shroud and found that picking the lock worked first try, every try, however the merchant conned Dubious & wouldn't sell to me.

Went to the Warrens & killed every Kobold I could find for an hour or so (I did about 2 "Laps" of the warrens).

Conned Amiable after that. Successfully got The Hole key, and the key to Paineel!

Hole Key Vendor Name and Location
QuoteReply
# Nov 27 2005 at 10:06 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1609114694105
118 posts
Bought a Hole Key and thought this might help:

Vendor is inside "Superior Supplies" and is named Rallia Hapera. Her /loc is 938, 761, -79

Once you enter Paineel, you must go through that initial section of the zone to the first teleport, then once through that, 'Find' will work for this vendor.

Edited, Sun Nov 27 10:10:01 2005
▲ Page top
Hole Keys for all!
QuoteReply
# Nov 22 2005 at 6:54 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1687133927602
Scholar
49 posts
hehe new way to get your key if your KOS!

1. Shroud into a Goblin Rogue
2. take some money and lockpicks to Paniel
3. Lockpick the paniel entrance rock thingy
4. Hide + Sneak to the trader, CTRL F to have a nice easy path too.
5. Buy the 'Hole Key'
6. Activate Spirit Sending and remove shroud
7. Congrates now your toon has there hole key

Im sure sony will find away to nerf this though :P
▲ Page top
The key
QuoteReply
# Aug 23 2005 at 4:07 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591848024030
View User Forum
23 posts
BTW when you are looking for the key in the venders list, it looks like a bag not a normal key. FYI so you don't think your not finding it. LOL

ZOOLA, Expert Jewler Prexus
▲ Page top
Key? We doon need no stinkin key!!
QuoteReply
# Aug 19 2005 at 6:22 AM Rating: Decent
Theeraputica
Scholar
54 posts
Haven't been to the hole in a long time, but I read these posts the other day about "needing a key" to get into the hole now.

So I spent several hours killing kobolds in the warrens. The end result: Guards still want to attack me and I still shrunk myself and went into the little hole in the rocks in the water and spent about 5 min clearing out the elementals (when you come out of the water) and down to the first bridge. Didn't even have any trouble when 3 of them jumped my pet. (Sick'm Boy!!) He just ate them up.

Long story short: Sometimes the old ways still work good. :-)

Edited, Fri Aug 19 07:38:50 2005
▲ Page top
Entry
QuoteReply
# Aug 13 2005 at 6:27 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592278164506
Scholar
75 posts
Eye of zomm (or the tinkered Stalking Probe) will open the Paineel elevator-door. As will a pick lock skill of 17 and probably lower. From there though you still need to be able to buy it. The Probe can help Sneak classes who are kos get there.
▲ Page top
easy Hole key
QuoteReply
# Apr 06 2005 at 12:56 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595175453658
View User Forum
253 posts
Best way to get this is by killing hella lotz of kobolds inside warrens until the skele guards become amiable or kindly and they gave yah a key to Paineel (the one that opens up the big stone) and since yer amiable with the guards yah dont have to worry in agroing npc inside and look for the merchant that sells the Hole key. Now aint that easy
▲ Page top
RE: easy Hole key
QuoteReply
# May 04 2005 at 10:31 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593364627439
Scholar
16 posts
Personally i think its far easier to get an erudite illusion potion to get your faction up enough. that might have just worked for me since i was a sk anyway, but i had been killing in the warrens and then decided to give it a try. drank the potion, asked the guard for a paneel key, then bought the key inside without taking the days required for enough faction for it. also much easier than buying tons of shrink potions (or begging a shrink) or having to get a rog or a bard.
